scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sage/shared build && pnpm --filter @sage/deepseek build && pnpm --filter @sage/runtime build && pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sage/shared build && pnpm --filter @sage/deepseek build && pnpm --filter @sage/runtime build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @sage/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @sage/deepseek typecheck && pnpm --filter @sage/runtime typecheck
